hotel_name: Khách sạn MerPerle Đà Lạt (MerPerle Dalat Hotel)

reviews.title: Cleanliness issue
reviews.text: I have very bad impressions about 5 stars hotel but worth 1 star for services. The facilities is just ok. Staff is friendly. The nightmare just began when I checked the toilet seat. It was filthy and the shit stain stay on the seat where your ass sit. Inside the room, you can find alive cock roach, bug, and mosquitos. Refrigerator is not cold enough. Not sound resistant, able to hear noise from outside. The matress is firm, umcomfortable to sleep.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great suite. Great breakfast. Welcoming staff.
reviews.negatives:
We went on a business trip and requested an invoice during our stay. The staff assured us it would be sent by the end of the day, but it’s now been a month and we’ve received nothing. Very disappointing.
What’s worse, management hasn’t responded to any of our follow-ups through Booking.com—our messages have been completely ignored. It’s a shame, because the hotel had the potential to be exceptional, but the lack of professionalism really let it down.

reviews.title: Short stay
reviews.text: My experience staying at Mer Perle in Da Lat, Vietnam wasn’t great. It’s listed as a 5-star hotel, but the customer service was terrible—from the receptionist to the breakfast buffet staff—and there was no one at the gate to greet us. The room smelled old and damp. During breakfast, the staff even rushed us to eat faster because they were closing in 10 minutes, which felt very unprofessional. The only good thing was the food itself. Everything else was a big disappointment. I would not recommend anyone stay here for this price.

reviews.title: NOT a very friendly place. NOT RECOMMENDED TO STAY
reviews.text:
The hotel is new so nothing to comment on the amenities. However, the service is extremely bad. I have a small child, some needs like diapers but the hotel does not sell so I have to buy outside. When the delivery person delivered the goods, I asked the delivery person to leave the goods at the security or reception and I would come to pick them up. The hotel did not allow, I had to bring 2 children while I thought after my husband finished showering, he could come to pick them up. Very strange policy. The hotel staff is not helpful. Not worth staying when you can have many other hotels that provide better. I will never recommend this place to families, especially those who need a lot of help with small children.
When I needed meeting room booking service, I had to wait for a long time and then no one came to help.
Very disappointed and too bad for a new and beautiful hotel but bad service.
----------------
Khách sạn mới nên không có gì để bình luận về tiện nghi. Tuy nhiên, dịch vụ cực kỳ tệ. Tôi có con nhỏ, một số cần như tã nhưng khách sạn không bán nên tôi phải mua ở bên ngoài. Khi người giao hàng giao hàng, tôi yêu cầu người giao hàng để lại hàng tại quầy bảo vệ hoặc lễ tân rồi tôi sẽ đến lấy. Khách sạn không cho phép, tôi phải mang theo 2 đứa trẻ trong khi tôi nghĩ sau khi chồng tôi tắm xong, anh ấy có thể đến lấy. Chính sách rất kỳ lạ. Nhân viên khách sạn không hữu ích. Không đáng để ở lại khi bạn có thể có nhiều khách sạn khác cung cấp tốt hơn. Tôi sẽ không bao giờ giới thiệu nơi này cho gia đình, đặc biệt là những người cần nhiều sự giúp đỡ khi có con nhỏ. 
Khi tôi cần dịch vụ đặt phòng họp, tôi đã phải đứng đợi rất lâu và sau đó cũng chẳng ai đến tiếp. 
Rất thất vọng và quá đáng tiếc cho 1 khách sạn mới và đẹp nhưng dịch vụ dở tệ.

reviews.text: Staff were terrible.  Nickels and dime with guests.  My travel mate booked room through agoda and hotel didn’t have information so she had to share room with us which required rollaway bed and they promised that was complimentary yet when checking out they were trying to charge 1/2.  Bathroom design was bad that everytime you shower, it would flood to outside of the stall and you’d be walking in flood water for the rest of the day.  Breakfast room cannot hold the amount of guests of the hotel so there would be this old guy standing next to our table waiting for us to be done so he can claim the space.  I would not recommend nor stay here again.  Price was expensive compared to other hotels nearby but it did not justify.

New hotel, clean but not recommended if you are looking for a nice and quiet place for your vacation.       This hotel is tailored to big tour groups.

Restaurant staffs are not well trained.  Their focus is to clear the table for the next guests.  If uou need something, they will ask you to go get it yourself.😅

Breakfast is not mediocre.  The only food that is some what eatable is Pho.    They have a wide varieties:  Vietnamese, Chinese and Korean but not quality food.

I will not return.

reviews.response:
Lời chào nồng nhiệt từ MerPerle Dalat Hotel,

Kính gửi chị Lê,

Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi nghe rằng chị không hài lòng với dịch vụ buffet sáng tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện mà chị đã gặp phải, đặc biệt là việc dọn dẹp thức ăn sớm và thái độ phục vụ không được như mong đợi.

Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và cải thiện quy trình phục vụ buffet sáng cũng như đào tạo lại nhân viên để đảm bảo mọi khách hàng đều có trải nghiệm tốt nhất. Ý kiến của chị là rất quan trọng để chúng tôi nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Cảm ơn chị đã chia sẻ ý kiến của mình và hy vọng rằng chị sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để phục vụ chị tốt hơn trong những lần sau.

Kính chúc chị sức khỏe và hạnh phúc!

Trân trọng,
Đội ngũ MerPerle Dalat Hotel

We appreciate your input and hope to have the opportunity to provide a more satisfying experience in the future.

Wishing you good health and happiness!
Best regards,

The MerPerle Dalat Hotel Team

reviews.title: Still don't understand why it was rated 5 stars.
reviews.text:
- The soundproofing is extremely poor, it feels like there are no walls. You can hear all the noises from the street, the next room, and the hallway. Even on the 7th floor, I can hear the garbage truck in the morning.
- The windows are not sealed properly, the wind comes through the window frame, making the room cold.
- The air conditioner only has a cooling mode, there is no heating. I have to wear many layers to sleep, which is uncomfortable.
- The shower in my room does not work; it only has a rainfall option or a handheld shower (you have to squat to take a shower). The bathroom door is poorly designed and bangs loudly against the frame, so of course, I can hear it banging from other rooms as well.
- There are no laundry bags in the room.
- The curtains are thin and do not completely block sunlight, so the room cannot be dark enough. Guests who want to sleep in late will not be able to.
- The gym does not have a water refill station and does not provide workout towels for guests. Luckily, a lifeguard at the pool lent me a towel.
- The room access card often has issues.
- The toilet is modern but has very weak flushing capability; even one piece of paper cannot be flushed down. At least it is quiet.
- The hallways on the floors are VERY drafty and VERY cold!
- The janitor Tú Anh had a very bad attitude towards customers when they were taking a long time to do their makeup in the lobby restroom on December 24, 2024. Their attitude and words were very unpleasant and offensive.

We truly hope for another opportunity to serve you and demonstrate the improvements and innovations in our services.

Thank you sincerely, and we wish you a wonderful day!

Best regards,
Merperle Dalat Hotel Team

reviews.title: Question about the 5-star standard???
reviews.text:
I have been here for 3 nights but still have questions about the hotel's 5-star standard. 
- Pros: 
+ The exterior design is super grand, there is water music every evening and a beautiful flower garden in front. 
+ The male staff are super friendly and very supportive. 
+ Modern toilets.
- Cons: 
+ The SOUNDPROOFING IS TERRIBLE, I am on the 6th floor but can clearly hear the sound of cars driving outside to the point where I can't sleep, and you can hear anyone talking in the hallway. 
+ When I checked in, there were 4 female receptionists but no one guided me on breakfast times or introduced the amenities, only one male staff member in a suit reminded the bellman to take care a bit. 
+ The staff do not greet customers, they just look and stare blankly, I think the hotel should retrain the staff's behavior when encountering guests, they should greet to create a better impression. 
+ The breakfast buffet is a bit simple compared to the 5-star standard.
=> Should stay for the experience once, but probably won't come back!!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: By 5-star standards, this hotel is questionable. The bathtub does not have a non-slip mat, and it's easy to slip while showering. The breakfast is pretty good. I wanted the front desk to help communicate with another hotel (because I don't speak Vietnamese) but they refused, stating that hotel policy prohibits contacting other hotels. Generally, hotels can assist with guest requests, but they completely rejected my request under the guise of hotel policy, which was very disappointing. The worst part is: the soundproofing of the windows is terrible; I stayed in a street-facing room, and the noise from the road was very loud all night. reviews.title: Excellent breakfast, clean and comfortable room
reviews.text:
As this is a 5-star hotel that just opened in 2024, it is as clean and comfortable as expected. The daily breakfast is very good despite the big crowd of Korean tourists hitting at 8AM and Vietnamese tourists at 9AM. 
Only disappointment is that the staff was wanting to charge us 1/2 of the RACK daily rate for an extra 5 hours late check out. We paid that amount for the WHOLE day from Agoda. Even the shift manager was unwilling to offer better pricing despite the fact that we had just stayed 5 nights, 2 rooms, there. So, we just checked out at Noon and went to a small homestay place literally around the corner of this hotel and paid only VND 500K (USD 20) for a room to use until 6PM before heading to airport.

In short, we had a great stay at the hotel. Staff was very friendly and helpful.  We were allowed to check in earlier, however the room was not the one I booked, which is hill view. reviews.title: Terrible place. Stay somewhere else
reviews.negatives:
Tôi đã có một trải nghiệm đáng thất vọng chỉ một sao tại Khách sạn MerPerle Dalat ở Dalat, Việt Nam. Dù được quảng cáo là một cơ sở năm sao, nó thực sự rất kém. Dịch vụ khách hàng thật kinh khủng; nhân viên không thân thiện và không hỗ trợ. Sau một tháng du lịch khắp Việt Nam, lưu trú tại đây là điểm thấp nhất trong hành trình của tôi. Tôi khuyên mọi người nên xem xét các lựa chọn lưu trú khác—tránh xa khách sạn này.

I had a regrettable one-star experience at the MerPerle Dalat Hotel in Dalat, Vietnam. Touted as a five-star establishment, it falls drastically short. The customer service was appalling; the staff was unfriendly and unaccommodating. After traveling Vietnam for a month, staying here was the lowest point of my journey. I urge everyone to consider other accommodations—steer clear of this hotel.

reviews.text:
ROOM: strictly check in time at 2pm and out at 12pm. Spacious and comfortable room. Nice window view and quite clean. Toilet is digitally controlled.
AMENITIES: only limited 2 bottle drinks per room. No drinking water provided at the fitness centre. Toiletries are well-equipped but no hair conditioner and no body lotion. Bed is large but pillows are too soft. Indoor heated swimming pool is very good. 
FOOD: breakfast is plentiful but not all are delicious. Place is very crowded. Food are replenished frequently. Better dishes appear after 8.00am when most tourists are gone.

Chào Ms Lan,

Cảm ơn bạn đã dành những lời khen ngợi cho Khách sạn MerPerle Dalat! Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết bạn đã có trải nghiệm hài lòng với vẻ đẹp phòng ốc, chất lượng buffet sáng ngon và phong phú.

Nhận xét của bạn về sự thiếu sót trong việc vệ sinh phòng, thay khăn và fill nước cho khách vào ngày lưu trú hôm sau đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận và xem xét nghiêm túc. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện này đã ảnh hưởng đến trải nghiệm của bạn. Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét lại quy trình giám sát việc dọn phòng để đảm bảo việc kiểm tra chất lượng được thực hiện thường xuyên và hiệu quả hơn.

Chúng tôi hy vọng rằng bạn sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để sửa chữa sai lầm và mang đến cho bạn trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo tại MerPerle Dalat.

Trân trọng,
MerPerle Dalat Hotel Team.

Kính gửi chị Lan,

Cảm ơn chị đã chia sẻ ý kiến về MerPerle Dalat Hotel. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết chị hài lòng với sự phong phú và ngon miệng của bữa sáng.

Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng dịch vụ dọn dẹp phòng và thay khăn không đáp ứng được mong đợi của chị. Chúng tôi sẽ xem xét và cải thiện quy trình này để đảm bảo dịch vụ tốt nhất cho khách hàng.

Chúng tôi rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón chị quay lại và cung cấp một trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo.

Kính chúc chị sức khỏe và hạnh phúc!

Trân trọng,
Đội ngũ MerPerle Dalat Hotel

reviews.text: The room is spacious and clean, the breakfast buffet is delicious with many options for guests to choose from. I went during the New Year, and the weather in Da Lat is quite cold at night. The only downside is that I stayed in the family room with 3 beds (room 815) right next to the elevator, where guests coming in and out talk very loudly. The soundproofing is poor, and a strong draft comes in through the entrance door. The air conditioning at night was set to 30°C but it wasn't warm at all. The water in the bathroom runs weakly, so when I hurried to shower, I was shivering while getting dressed; even though I set the air conditioning high, I didn't feel any warmth at all.

reviews.title: Mixed thoughts on hotel stay
reviews.text:
Quite impressive pulling up to hotel and seeing the lobby at check in with the nice decor and service, but can be quite hectic with large groups in lobby checkin in at the same time. Lots of big tourist groups use this hotel. 
Rooms are nice but bathroom shower/tub is not very thought out. 
Have to step into high tub to take shower and getting out could be quite  dangerous. Water also can splash all over bathroom if not careful. Also room on seventh floor but is still quite loud from traffic and noise from the street below. Need better sound proofing for noise so hard to get to sleep.  Breakfast buffet has more western food instead of local Vietnamese food. Would like more local food besides pho. 
I’m not so sure if this would be my first choice if I was to return to visit if I didn’t get a good price for the stay; nicer restaurants are not as close to area.

reviews.title: 2-night, 3-day accommodation review
reviews.text: The location is slightly away from the city center, but it is closely located to other tourist attractions. The check-in time was around 2 AM, and the staff was kind enough to assist. The condition of the accommodation was good, with no humidity. Although the breakfast options were limited, everything was satisfying to my taste. The heated pool was in good condition and there was a safety manager present, making it safe for children to enjoy, and adults could enjoy it as well. I used the heated pool for about an hour, and it was a pleasant experience. However, since three adults, including a child, stayed in one room, it would have been better if they had arranged an extra bed instead of a queen bed. During the entire schedule, I stayed at another hotel closer to the city center for a few days, and I personally regretted not staying here the entire time.

reviews.response:
Warm greetings from MerPerle Dalat Hotel,

Dear Oh,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We appreciate your comments about our new facilities and the variety of our buffet breakfast.

We regret to hear that the noise from the roundabout and the road affected your stay. We understand that this might be challenging to address fully, but we will consider your feedback as we continue to seek ways to enhance our guests' experience.

Thank you again for choosing MerPerle Dalat Hotel. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an even better experience.

Wishing you all the best!

Sincerely,
The MerPerle Dalat Hotel Team

reviews.title: A hotel that is a bit chaotic due to a lot of guests.
reviews.text: During my 3-night stay, I was quite disappointed with the breakfast dining area. It's better to go early; going late feels like having a chaotic meal in a second-rate room that is just hastily set up. Visiting the proper breakfast restaurant made this feeling even stronger. Although it's a 5-star hotel, it gives off a 4-star vibe. The bread was plentiful and delicious. The staple food was tasty as well. The food was good overall. The room was spacious and nice—a triple double bedroom. I was satisfied with the ample space. There is some noise because the door doesn’t fit well, but it's still bearable. The pool is small and has a strong bleach smell, so I didn't use it. It's a bit far from the city; a taxi ride to the night market costs about 40,000 VND. Although on April 30, I was overcharged at 90,000 VND. There are no local restaurants nearby, only a Korean restaurant, which seems geared towards group tourists.

reviews.title: Merperle Dalat hotel - wonderful
reviews.text: We stayed for one night in the family room: the room was clean, spacious, airy, with a sofa, two large TVs, and a high-end bathroom that was very new and convenient. The location is not too far from the center, and it's easy to book a Grab taxi. The breakfast was fairly good. During the holiday, the hotel was busy, but moving around with the elevator was comfortable, and we didn't have to wait long. Especially, the hotel has a warm indoor swimming pool on the 9th floor, which is very enjoyable for swimming in the chilly morning in Da Lat. It's just a pity that the hotel is on a major road, so there's a lot of traffic noise at night. We will return to the hotel next time. The room rate is not cheap, but it's commensurate with the hotel's amenities.

Location wise is 15 minutes from the city where's all the activities at, but for someone seeking into the quiet and peaceful time this is your best hotel. Heated Inside pool with the gym area. I stayed at the 8th floor which my room view was double mountains which's flawlessly and peacefully and beautifully. Clean room with nice decorations, advantage and clean bathroom equipments.
reviews.response:
Warm greetings from MerPerle Dalat Hotel!
Dear Mr Taylor,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you had a positive experience with our hotel and appreciated the professionalism and friendliness of our staff.

We look forward to welcoming you back to MerPerle Dalat Hotel in the future for another pleasant stay.
Wishing you health, happiness, and peace!

Best regards,
MerPerle Dalat Hotel Team

reviews.title: Should stay
reviews.text:
The check-in and check-out ceremony was very quick. However, I was not very satisfied with the check-in time as the room was not ready; I had to wait until 2:35 PM to receive the room after arriving at 1:30 PM. 
The entrance and exit of the parking lot are well designed, and the staff were very enthusiastic in assisting with parking. 
The breakfast was very good, with a variety of dishes. Although the hotel was very crowded, the breakfast service was very good, and the restaurant was spacious with many tables. 
The black coffee needs improvement (too diluted compared to many hotels I have stayed at). 
There is a very good play area for children. 
Overall, this is the best hotel I have ever stayed at.

Chúng tôi rất mong được chào đón chị quay lại trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo và hy vọng sẽ mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn nữa.

Kính chúc chị sức khỏe và hạnh phúc!

Trân trọng,

reviews.title: Nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại MerPerle
reviews.text:
Gia đình tôi vừa kết thúc hành trình 4 ngày 3 đêm tại Đà Lạt và thực sự cảm thấy may mắn khi đã tin tưởng lựa chọn MerPerle làm nơi dừng chân. Đây không chỉ là một khách sạn, mà là một phần quan trọng khiến chuyến đi của gia đình tôi trở nên trọn vẹn và đáng nhớ hơn bao giờ hết.

Không gian đẳng cấp: Ngay từ khi bước vào, cả nhà đã bị ấn tượng bởi lối kiến trúc sang trọng, cổ điển nhưng vẫn mang lại cảm giác vô cùng ấm cúng giữa cái se lạnh của Đà Lạt.

Dịch vụ tận tâm: Đội ngũ nhân viên thực sự rất chuyên nghiệp và tinh tế. Mọi yêu cầu của gia đình, từ việc sắp xếp phòng cho đến hỗ trợ các dịch vụ nhỏ nhất, đều được đáp ứng với nụ cười niềm nở và sự chu đáo tuyệt vời.

Tiện nghi hoàn hảo: Phòng ốc luôn sạch sẽ, tầm nhìn đẹp và bữa sáng đa dạng, hợp khẩu vị với cả người lớn lẫn trẻ nhỏ trong đoàn.

Cảm ơn MerPerle đã chăm sóc gia đình tôi bằng tất cả sự chân thành. Nếu có dịp quay lại thành phố mộng mơ, MerPerle chắc chắn vẫn sẽ là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi!

reviews.text: Originally, this trip was combined with my daughter's birthday celebration. However, on the day of my child's birthday, our family was very surprised when we returned from our outing and opened the door to find a small birthday cake and a congratulatory card from the hotel. Our family was very surprised, and my daughter felt very excited and happy about this unexpected gift. I sincerely thank the hotel very much.

reviews.title: Perfect vacation
reviews.text: Our group arrived at the hotel an hour early, and the staff was very helpful, allowing us to check in early. The room was spacious, clean, and well-ventilated, with all the necessary amenities. Especially, the pillows were very comfortable, perfect for someone like me who often suffers from headaches. The breakfast buffet was quite tasty and suited our group's taste; we had breakfast there three times without feeling bored. Another plus for Merperle is that the toilet is fully touch-operated. The housekeeping staff was very enthusiastic; even on the day we checked out, they came to ask if we needed more drinks or any items. The view from up high was truly beautiful, allowing us to see the entire train moving. The only slight regret is that the room didn't have a balcony; it only had a large sliding glass door, which made it a bit difficult to take photos with the high view. Other than that, everything was wonderful, and I will definitely return to Merperle when I visit Da Lat ❤.

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.text: I needed to plan an earlier flight home in a foreign country. Staff named Yen went above and beyond to make sure i had transportation arrangement and flight booked correctly.  She must have sat and talked to me and various representatives on the phone for few hours!  Things happen during trips and need to get home in a hurry, and I’m thankful I met truly caring staff that cared enough to help as if her own problem. I would highly recommend because of clean facility, good breakfast buffet, location, and most importantly truly caring staff like Yen.

reviews.title: Dalat's top new 5-star hotel rated 5 out of 5 points.
reviews.text: I made a cheap reservation for the grand opening promotion after the renovation on December 17, 2023. The bathroom is perfect with a bidet, shower booth, amenities, and towels, while the bedroom has clean and luxurious bedding. The TV frame is ivory, matching the classic and antique interior, and I enjoyed the features like Netflix, YouTube, mobile screening, and a sleek remote. The best part was the breakfast. Although not all the food was Vietnamese, it was delicious, served warm with a variety of options for refills, which was satisfying. The reception staff, manager, porter, and doorman were all friendly, and the facilities like the pool, gym, and bar were great. I wanted to enjoy the spa too, especially with a 20% discount, but unfortunately, it was disappointing. I think this might be the best hotel in Dalat, so I give it a perfect score.
